results.title: Q1 2026 Customer Churn Analysis
results.summary: Predictive model identifying high-risk customer segments with 87% accuracy. Recommends targeted retention campaigns for 3 key segments.

results.title: Customer Retention Drivers — ML Feature Importance
results.summary: Feature importance analysis revealing top 5 drivers of customer retention: login frequency, transaction diversity, support ticket resolution time, cashback usage, and peer referrals.
